Electrical and Computer Engineering Directory

About our faculty and staff

Our nationally recognized faculty, researchers and professional staff are dedicated to excellence in research, education, innovation and service. Learn more about the individuals who make up the Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering by visiting their profiles.

Robert S. Balog

  • Professor, Electrical & Computer Engineering
  • Director, Renewable Energy and Advanced Power Electronics Laboratory (REAPER)
  • Affiliated Faculty, Multidisciplinary Engineering
  • Office: WEB 236A
  • Phone: 979-862-4985
  • Email: rbalog@tamu.edu

  • Professor, Electrical & Computer Engineering
  • Moore Professor
  • Office: WEB 320E
  • Phone: 979-862-1553
